summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phase 4 features: ROI calculator, analysis reconciliation, and Playwright fallback scrapers. All 16 tests passed with 100% success rate.
passed_tests: ROI Calculator with default stake (10.0) - all required fields present
ROI Calculator with custom stake (20.0) - total_wagered calculation correct
ROI per tier - all tiers (Maxima, Alta, Media) have complete ROI data (won, lost, settled, rate, profit, wagered, roi_pct)
Track pick with odds field (1.85) - successfully tracked and ROI calculation updated
Analysis reconciliation - perfect match: 5 analyzed = 0 recommended + 5 discarded
Analysis reconciliation - all discarded entries have required fields (match_id, match_label, reason/missing)
Playwright fallback endpoint - returns correct structure with sofascore_pw and flashscore_pw keys
Standard fallback endpoint - ESPN working with 36 matches
Authorization required for /stats/dashboard with stake parameter
